creator: freebsd@ny-central.org
text:
Terribly sorry for dropping the ball on this. Just realized I had not completed this. I'm prepping an update to 3.2.3240 right now, that will fix this. It already works on my machine and I am waiting for poudriere to complete its run.

If everyone is ok with moving to the next version, I suggest we close this once the updated version is committed.
